notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, waves, diving, particles) but enemy entrance logic is buggy (y position calculation wrong), visuals are minimal wireframe shapes far from authentic Galaga sprites, and the boss 'capture' mechanic is incomplete/non-functional.
Game-breaking logic bugs: player becomes permanently invincible after one death, and the dual-fighter upgrade is impossible to get due to an object reference error when the boss changes color.

The build is mostly runnable with responsive basic controls, but it misses key Galaga mechanics like actual capture/rescue behavior, has simplistic non-authentic visuals, and contains gameplay/state issues such as invulnerability never ticking down and title/intro handling that make it only a mediocre Galaga approximation.
